---
title: "ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications"
author: Bui Tien Thanh (tt.bui.2025@mitb.smu.edu.sg) 
---

Welcome! Use the links below to navigate to each section.

::::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 2rem;"}
::: {style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5rem;"}
### Hands-on Exercises

Practice exercises following the weekly tutorials.

[Go to Hands-on Exercises →](Hands-on_Ex/index.qmd)
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5rem;"}
### In-class Exercises

Activities completed during class sessions.

[Go to In-class Exercises →](In-class_Ex/index.qmd)
:::
:::::
